channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Back-to-back powerful earthquakes hit Venezuela
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Things to know about the Venezuela earthquakes
- How to help those affected by the earthquakes in Venezuela
- Things to know about the Venezuela earthquakes
- Things to know about the Venezuela earthquakes
- How to Help Those Impacted by the Earthquakes in Venezuela
- Why Venezuelan earthquakes could be the most devastating there in modern history
- Venezuela Hit by Strongest Earthquake in Over a Century
- Why the Venezuelan Earthquakes Happened, and What to Expect Next
- Twin earthquakes flatten buildings in Venezuela
- The Science Behind Venezuela’s Doublet Earthquake
- Venezuela earthquakes in maps and graphics - where they hit and how severe they could be
- Did the first quake trigger the second? Watch Video of the Venezuela earthquake that stunned seismologists — what does this rare double rupture reveal about the hidden dangers beneath northern Venezuela?
- Venezuela earthquakes: What we know so far
- Venezuela earthquakes: Why is Central America so vulnerable to tremors?
- Venezuela earthquakes: Why is Central America so vulnerable to tremors?
- Two earthquakes, two epicentres, 39 seconds apart: The 'doublet' that shook Venezuela
- After Venezuela's deadly earthquakes, lessons from Japan, Chile and Mexico in earthquake preparedness
- Venezuela rocked by 7.5, 7.2 earthquakes: What happened and what we know
- Moments of panic as earthquakes strike Venezuela
- Feature: Powerful quakes jolt Venezuela within a minute
- Strongest Earthquakes in Century Strike Venezuela: What Is Known So Far
- Powerful Earthquakes Rock Venezuelan Capital
- Venezuela shaken by magnitude 7.5 and 7.2 earthquakes
- Venezuela rocked by 7.5, 7.2 earthquakes: What happened and what we know
- Venezuela’s deadly history of earthquakes — and how they affected its politics
- Massive damage done by earthquake in Venezuela — radio
- Powerful back-to-back earthquakes strike Venezuela, collapsing buildings in Caracas
- Back-to-back powerful earthquakes slam Venezuela, collapsing buildings in the capital of Caracas
- Venezuela quakes live: Tremors of 7.5 and 7.2 collapse buildings in Caracas
- Earthquakes of 7+ magnitudes strike Venezuela back-to-back; buildings collapse, fatalities likely | Scary visuals
- 2 Powerful Earthquakes Rock Venezuela]]>

item.title: Death toll rises to 164 after powerful earthquakes strike Venezuela
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Venezuela earthquakes leave 188 dead, 1,520 injured
- Venezuela earthquakes death toll rises to 188
- Back-to-back powerful earthquakes hit Venezuela, causing widespread damage
- Venezuela earthquakes death toll rises to 188 as aftershocks continue
- At least 188 dead in Venezuela earthquake, many more injured, missing
- At least 250 buildings damaged by earthquake in Venezuela
- Venezuela: 188 dead in devastating, back-to-back earthquakes
- Death toll from Venezuela earthquakes rises to 188 as rescuers search for survivors
- Venezuela twin quakes kill at least 32, injure over 700
- Dual earthquakes rock Venezuela, killing hundreds
- Two Massive Earthquakes Struck Venezuela. Thousands Are Feared Dead
- Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 164, death toll expected to rise
- Two massive earthquakes hit Venezuela
- Thousands feared dead in Venezuela after two major earthquakes - Reuters
- Thousands feared dead in Venezuela after two major earthquakes
- Catastrophic Damage: Deadly Venezuela Quake Marks Country’s Most Powerful Seismic Event Since 1900
- Massive Earthquake Strikes Venezuela as Fears Grow Death Toll Could Reach 100,000
- "Utter Devastation": Thousands Feared Dead in Venezuela After Double Earthquakes
- 2 powerful quakes hit Venezuela, killing at least 164 and injuring nearly 1,000
- Venezuela president: Death toll from earthquakes rises to at least 164
- 164 killed in Venezuela after back-to-back earthquakes. What to know

- Venezuela: 164 dead in devastating, back-to-back earthquakes

- Death toll rises to 164 in back-to-back earthquakes in Venezuela

- Flash: Death toll rises to 164 in Venezuela's strong earthquakes -- acting president

- At least 164 dead, nearly a thousand injured in Venezuela earthquakes
- Venezuela quake death toll hits 164, casualties expected to rise significantly
- Back-to-back earthquakes leave 32 dead in Venezuela
- Venezuela earthquakes live updates: At least 32 dead and 700 injured after powerful twin tremors

- At least 32 killed and 700 injured in powerful Venezuela earthquakes
- World reacts as devastating Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 32
- Powerful earthquakes kill at least 32 in Venezuela, hundreds injured
- IN BRIEF: Powerful earthquake leaves 32 dead, 700 injured in Venezuela
- Thousands feared dead after two major earthquakes strike Venezuela
- Thousands feared dead as massive earthquakes rock Venezuela
- Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 32, injure 700
- Two Powerful Earthquakes Strike Venezuela, Many Casualties Feared
- Casualties feared as powerful earthquakes hit Venezuela
- Venezuela struck by back-to-back earthquakes, many casualties feared
- Thousands feared dead after double earthquake in Venezuela

- Flash: 32 killed in Venezuela earthquakes, 700 others injured, says acting president
- Back-to-back powerful earthquakes hit Venezuela, causing widespread damage
- At least 32 killed and 700 injured in powerful Venezuela earthquakes

- At least 32 people killed in Venezuelan earthquake — agency

- Two strong earthquakes hit Venezuela
- Venezuela rocked by two huge earthquakes]]>
